items.title: New Papers — discreet (Demo)
items.summary: Silver Vey's standing offer. New identity documents. Three days. Twelve thousand sparks. Visible to demo state only.

items.title: Quarter Introduction (Demo)
items.summary: Oren Lim's standing introduction service. Get connected to the neon quarter without paying retail rates. Five hundred sparks.

items.title: A Word with Ghost-7 (Demo)
items.summary: Lavren's standing offer — a single message carried into the lattice's silent channels. Reply not guaranteed. Three thousand sparks.

items.title: Cross-World Satchel (Demo)
items.summary: An unmarked satchel delivered hub-to-cyber overnight. No questions, no logging. Two hundred sparks per pound.

items.title: An Audience with Silas Thorpe (Demo)
items.summary: A meeting on the Pier. Thorpe will hear you for thirty seconds. After that depends on you. Eight thousand sparks.
